headline: BAT Axes 9,000 Jobs in Deepening Restructure

article.title: BAT Cuts 9,000 Jobs as Its Turnaround Program Intensifies
article.summary: British American Tobacco Plc is reducing its 47,000-strong global workforce by about one-fifth as part of its sweeping plan to bring down costs and simplify operations.

headline: India Rating Steady Amid 5% Deficit Risk

article.title: Moody’s Says India Rating Safe Despite Potential Deficit Gap
article.summary: India can withstand a potentially wider-than-forecast fiscal deficit this year without jeopardizing its investment-grade rating, according to Moody’s Ratings, as higher energy prices are expected to pose only temporary budget pressures.
